---

## 🐛 Bug Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## 🔄 Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## ✅ Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## ❌ Actual Behavior
A clear and concise description of what actually happened.

## 📱 Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## 🖥️ Environment Information
- **OS**: [e.g. macOS, Windows, Linux]
- **Browser**: [e.g. Chrome 120, Safari 17, Firefox 121]
- **Device**: [e.g. iPhone 14, Desktop, Samsung Galaxy S23]
- **Screen Size**: [e.g. 1920x1080, Mobile 375x667]

## 🌐 Application Context
- **Page/Route**: [e.g. /listings, /business-dashboard]
- **User Type**: [e.g. Anonymous, Authenticated, Business Owner]
- **Language**: [e.g. Thai, English]

## 📊 Additional Context
- **Error Messages**: Any console errors or error messages
- **Network Requests**: Any failed API calls (check Developer Tools)
- **Browser Console**: Any JavaScript errors

```
Paste any relevant error messages or console output here
```

## 🔍 Debugging Information
- [ ] I have checked the browser console for errors
- [ ] I have tried refreshing the page
- [ ] I have tried in an incognito/private browser window
- [ ] I have tested in a different browser
- [ ] I have cleared browser cache and cookies

## 📋 Severity Level
- [ ] Critical - Application is unusable
- [ ] High - Major feature is broken
- [ ] Medium - Minor feature issue
- [ ] Low - Cosmetic or minor inconvenience

## 🎯 Impact Assessment
**Who is affected?**
- [ ] All users
- [ ] Authenticated users only
- [ ] Business owners only
- [ ] Mobile users only
- [ ] Desktop users only

**Business Impact:**
- [ ] Prevents user registration/login
- [ ] Breaks payment processing
- [ ] Affects business listings
- [ ] Impacts search functionality
- [ ] Other: _______________

## 🛠️ Possible Solution
If you have suggestions on how to fix this bug, please describe them here.

## 📝 Additional Notes
Add any other context about the problem here.
